Title: Sulu: Used API Keys may be available via Admin API
Description: The users endpoint controller exposes a project's apiKey field to the logged-in user, provided they have permission for that endpoint. This only has impact if a project itself uses that specific field, Sulu itself does nothing with it and has no authentication per apiKey in its core.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 2.6.23, all versions starting from 3.0.0-alpha1 before 3.0.6
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 2.6.23 before 3.0.0-alpha1, all versions starting from 3.0.6
